what_i_built: A clean calculator with keyboard support, history tape, and the dark terminal aesthetic. My first real standalone project on the site — the one that proved the concept works.
what_was_tricky: Honestly? Not much. Calculators are well-trodden ground. The real challenge was deciding how polished to make it — this was the first project visitors would see, so it had to feel good. I spent more time on the glow effects and button feedback than on the actual math.
fun_facts: 286 lines of code, all in a single HTML file
Keyboard support was a last-minute addition that made it 10x better
The history tape was inspired by old receipt-printer calculators
